hero.introduction: I'm a political economist studying how **citizens form beliefs and attitudes about AI**, and how this impacts their **political behavior and preferences for government policies**. I build **interactive tools** for research and teaching, combining experimental methods with computational modeling.

aboutPreview.title: About Me
aboutPreview.description: I am a Ph.D. Candidate in Political Science at Stony Brook University, studying how citizens form beliefs and attitudes about AI, and how this impacts their political behavior and preferences for government policies. My dissertation, "Three Essays on the Political Implications of AI," examines these questions using experimental methods and computational modeling.
